title: Petrosedum × hommelsii
intro: Petrosedum × hommelsii, also known as Sedum × kamschaticum or 'Hommels Upright', is a succulent plant species that is a hybrid of Sedum kamtschaticum and Sedum divergens, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Petrosedum × hommelsii include flavonoids, triterpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Petrosedum × hommelsii is commonly used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat gastrointestinal issues and promote overall well-being.

Petrosedum × hommelsii is also a member of the genus Petrosedum, which is a group of succulents known for their unique rock-dwelling adaptations.
